title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 231.040 - Copies of road laws to be furnished county commission
text:
231.040.  Copies of road laws to be furnished county commission. — Five copies of the road laws of this state, properly indexed, in pamphlet form shall be forwarded to the clerk of each of the counties for the use of the county commission.  Additional copies shall be forwarded upon application by the commission.
(RSMo 1939 § 8592, A.L. 1961 p. 558) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7943; 1919 § 10730; 1909 § 10548
